title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: SpaceX IPO: Everything you need to know
summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration

title: KuCoin has not paid $2M award tied to delisted token dispute, investor says
summary: A Seychelles court said KuCoin can’t treat unwithdrawn tokens as “abandoned,” and awarded a Swiss investor over $2 million. He says the exchange still hasn’t paid and plans to sue again.

title: Morning Minute: SpaceX Prices Largest IPO Ever at $135
summary: Hyperliquid has SpaceX trading at $177 a share. Will we see a 30% pop on open this morning?

title: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO: The Bull and Bear Case for Bitcoin
summary: SpaceX’s $75 billion IPO has already drained crypto liquidity, but a strong first-day pop could help rotate profits back, analysts argue.

title: SpaceX tokenized IPO campaign draws $557M on Binance ahead of debut
summary: Crypto markets are becoming a new venue for pre-IPO price discovery ahead of SpaceX's highly anticipated debut today.

title: SpaceX IPO update: Whale opens $22.3M SPCX long as synthetic price hits 30% premium
summary: SpaceX’s IPO hype may fuel a strong debut, but history shows richly valued listings often struggle after the first-day pop fades.

title: SEC plan to scrap ‘Rule 611’ positive for tokenized US stocks: Galaxy
summary: Galaxy’s Alex Thorn says a plan to scrap rules on stock orders and quotes would remove a major barrier to tokenized stocks trading on decentralized platforms.

title: Avalanche Treasury falls 16% as it debuts on Nasdaq
summary: Avalanche Treasury holds about 15 million of the blockchain’s native token, AVAX, which is trading at a five-year low.

summary: Devin Kim alleged he was terminated after repeatedly warning about bias, misinformation, and dangerous outputs from Elon Musk's Grok chatbot.
